1734220.name: Students' horrible stories FIN - Broken gray event
1734220.description:
The Broken Gray Event deals with the content that The Presenter omitted from the students' horrible stories FIN - sHadoW FrIEND DLC.
It's kind of a prequel, just like sHadoW FrIEND DLC.

Anyone who has played the game to the end can enjoy it, and even those who have finished playing 'sHadoW FrIEND' will enjoy it even more.
It is a DLC that corresponds to the side story of the 'original' and has been ported to the Steam version as it is, except for a few lines of dialogue and certain events.

No chase scenes, only puzzles and navigation await YOU.
